dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: `XDG_STATE_HOME=/tmp/furrow-review-state bash tests/integration/test-merge-e2e.sh` passes only because `test_safe_e2e_verify_green` accepts verify exit `7`; the run shows `frw doctor` returning `RESULT: FAIL`, so the AC requiring a clean merge with doctor green is not met.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: `shellcheck` reports `bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-resolve-plan.sh:111` `_get_machine_merge_details()` is never invoked (`SC2329`), so this new branching helper has no exercised test path.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: The contract says all phases reject invalid policy via `schemas/merge-policy.schema.json`, but `bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-lib.sh` only greps for top-level keys and `schema_version`; it never validates against the schema file.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: Wave-3 file ownership in `.furrow/rows/install-and-merge/plan.json` is limited to merge command/scripts/policy/tests, but the submitted diff also changes out-of-scope files like `install.sh`, `bin/frw.d/install.sh`, `schemas/reintegration.schema.json`, and many `.furrow/...` artifacts without a merge-process-skill-specific justification.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: `shellcheck` reports concrete issues in delivered files, including `bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-verify.sh:168` using undefined variable `rescue_path` (`SC2154`) and `bin/frw.d/hooks/script-guard.sh:1` missing a shebang/shell directive (`SC2148`).
